column1: # ESP32-S3 N16R8 custom partition table — 16 MB flash
# Adds a 4 MB "model" partition for ESP-SR WakeNet + MultiNet models.
# HOW TO USE IN ARDUINO IDE:
#   1. Copy this file next to your .ino sketch (same folder)
#   2. In Arduino IDE: Tools > Partition Scheme > Custom

column2: the board package needs updating to v3.x)

column1: #   3. Flash the ESP-SR model binary to the model partition:
#      Tools > ESP32 Sketch Data Upload  -or-  esptool.py write_flash 0x410000 model.bin
#      The model binary is in your arduino-esp32 install under:
